docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-26-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SC-221 RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOU, JASON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOU, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICE, BRADFORD $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,130.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 HAVE BEEN INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHOU, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT RICE, BRADFORD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DECLARATION OF JASON CHOU RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOU, JASON

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $75.00 ON THE 5TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE:SEPTEMBER-05-2014 UNTIL: OCTOBER-05-2016. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $80.00. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS: THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($80.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED APR-26-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICE, BRADFORD

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2014 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. VISITING JUDGE DAVID FLINN, CLERK JEAN KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 5/19/2014. THE CASE IS REMANDED BACK TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHOU, JASON RECOVER FROM APPELLANT RICE, BRADFORD $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, $750.00 PENALTY, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,880.00, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 5/19/2014. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2014 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT RICE, BRADFORD MAILED TO RESPONDENT CHOU, JASON
